reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/18251157111954801525/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aVldteGxkbk5UUm14ME0wdExObGxCTFhoeldHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Coffee was good, food was very bad, we had ordered classic mac and cheese which was under seasoned without any flavour of cheese, salt and pepper it was like macroni was over boiled in milk with veggies, along with that we had ordered toasties that was soggy for a toastie but the topping tasted good but again it was like on a soggy bread.

Vibes of the place is good and service is okaish. I hope they improve the food quality. But I still feel food was very average, wouldn't visit again because there are better and quality offerings around.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.

reviews.comment: This place deserves a negative stars for food (specially pasta). There's no taste at all, I ordered Mac and Cheese Pasta (just to be on safe side) and i don't know what to comment on it, coz it had no taste at all. Along with pasta i ordered cold coffee and garlic cheese tosties, in which coffee was okayies (not good as per the price) and tosties was very bad. overall a very bad experience.
